YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_SELECT.title: Ring of Seven Curses
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_SELECT.descriptio: Obtain the Ring of Seven Curses relic
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_SKIP.title: Skip
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_SKIP.description: Do not select the Ring of Seven Curses, continue.
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_MODIFIER.title: Ring of Seven Curses
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_MODIFIER.descript: Obtain the Ring of Seven Curses relic
YUWANCARD-RING_OF_SEVEN_CURSES.title: Ring of Seven Curses
YUWANCARD-RING_OF_SEVEN_CURSES.descripti: Damage taken +50%, damage to non-Boss enemies -25%, [gold]Block[/gold] gained -20%, Gold gained -50%, [gold]Rest Site[/gold] HP recovery -50%, gain a [gold]Curse card[/gold] at the start of each turn, max HP -25% after killing a Boss. Energy +1, Draw +1, [gold]Potion slots[/gold] +1, [gold]Card rewards[/gold] +1, damage to Bosses +50%, normal enemies have a chance to drop [gold]Relics[/gold], can ignore path when selecting rooms on each floor.
YUWANCARD-RING_OF_SEVEN_CURSES.additiona: [gold][Ring of Seven Curses][/gold] heal 15% of max HP ({ActualHeal}).
YUWANCARD-TEN_YEAR_BAMBOO.title: Ten Year Bamboo
YUWANCARD-TEN_YEAR_BAMBOO.description: Gain {BlockBonus} [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of each turn. Defeating Elite enemies increases Block by 1. Defeating Bosses increases Block by 3.
YUWANCARD-TEN_YEAR_BAMBOO.flavor: Ten years of bamboo, tough and resilient.
YUWANCARD-HAOTIAN_HAMMER.title: Haotian Hammer
YUWANCARD-HAOTIAN_HAMMER.description: At the start of your turn, upgrade all [gold]Sovereign Blades[/gold] in all players' hands.
YUWANCARD-HAOTIAN_HAMMER.flavor: The emperor's weapon, supreme among swords.
YUWANCARD-REINCARNATED_EYE.title: Reincarnated Eye
YUWANCARD-REINCARNATED_EYE.description: At the start of your first turn each combat, choose a card from your deck to copy and add to your hand.
YUWANCARD-REINCARNATED_EYE.flavor: With double pupils, one sees infinite possibilities.
YUWANCARD-REINCARNATED_EYE.selectionProm: Choose a card from your deck to copy
YUWANCARD-SUPREME_BONE.title: Supreme Bone
YUWANCARD-SUPREME_BONE.description: At the start of each combat, choose 2 cards from your deck and give them [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When your HP first drops below 30%, instantly gain 2 Energy and draw 3 cards.
YUWANCARD-SUPREME_BONE.flavor: The Supreme Bone holds supreme power.
